entity.description: This product is for overnight use. It has a soft & stretchable 360˚ waistband which provides comfortable fit for baby on the move. It has a superb absorbency core which allows fast absorption and quick drying surface. It has a double leak guard to fit baby's leg comfortably and provides protection against side leakage. It has a colour-changing wetness indicator which changes colour when  wet. It also has a soft & breathable outer cover which allows good air-flow through.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Soft & stretchable 360˚ waistband which provides comfortable fit for baby on the move
• Superb absorbency core which allows fast absorption and quick drying surface
• Double leak guard to fit baby's leg comfortably and provides protection against side leakage
• A colour-changing wetness indicator which changes colour when wet
• Soft & breathable outer cover which allows good air-flow through

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• How to wear
1. Pull up like pants with disposal tape behind
2. Ensure leg guards are fitted and not folded to prevent leakage
• How to remove & dispose 1. Tear off seams on both sides to remove
2. Roll up soiled diaper pants and secure it with disposal tape

product.description:
This product has a superb absorbent core which allows dual absorption zone for quick absorption and retention of liquid that keeps skin dry. It has an effective Leakage Protection to ensure optimum leakage security. It has a breathable backsheet
that allows good air-flow through, providing maximum comfort. It provides ease of removal. It has a 360˚ soft elastic waistband
that provides comfortable fit even when on the move. It has a blue elastic lines on back of pants to make it easy for wearer to determine the front and back of pants. It has a wetness indicator that changes colour when wet. Regular changing is recommended to keep wearer comfortable.

metaData.Key Information:
• A superb absorbent core which allows dual absorption zone for quick absorption and retention of liquid that keeps skin dry
• Effective leakage protection to ensure optimum leakage security
• Breathable backsheet that allows good air-flow through, providing maximum comfort
• Provides ease of removal
• 360˚ soft elastic waistband that provides comfortable fit even when on the move
• Blue elastic lines on back of pants to make it easy for wearer to determine the front and back of pants
• Wetness indicator that changes colour when wet
